cards.title: Frontend (Dining Room)
cards.body: What the user sees — buttons, text, images, forms. Built with React, HTML, and CSS. Runs in the user's browser.

cards.title: Backend (Kitchen)
cards.body: Where data is stored and processed — user accounts, saved items, calculations. Runs on a server. The user never sees this code.

cards.title: API (Waiter)
cards.body: The messenger between frontend and backend. The frontend sends a request, the backend processes it, and the API carries the response back.
